query: Nimble nimbleway.com launched announced new feature product update 2026
answer: Nimble launched AI triage in April 2026 and shipped major Q1 updates including a redesigned mobile app.

results.title: Nimble announces AI-powered triage and sprint planning
results.snippet: Nimble launched AI issue triage in April 2026, automatically categorizing and prioritizing incoming issues based on team patterns.

results.title: Nimble Product Update - Q1 2026
results.snippet: Q1 2026 highlights: faster search, new roadmap view, Slack thread sync, and a redesigned mobile app.
